result.name: upgrade
result.title: Upgrade plan
result.description: Start or change a paid plan for the current customer. On UI hosts this opens the embedded checkout; on text hosts returns a markdown summary with a checkout URL. This tool only returns a read-only snapshot or opens the UI — actual charges happen later in the embedded checkout after the customer confirms. Also available: manage_account (current plan + cancel/reactivate), activate_plan (pick or activate a specific plan), topup (add credits). By default renders the UI iframe with a one-line placeholder; pass `mode: 'text'` for a markdown-only summary on CLI / text-only hosts, or `mode: 'auto'` to include both.

result.name: manage_account
result.title: Manage account
result.description: Show or manage the current customer's SolvaPay account: plan, balance, usage, payment method, cancel/reactivate auto-renewal. On UI hosts this opens the embedded account view; on text hosts returns a markdown summary. Also available: upgrade (start/change a paid plan), activate_plan (pick or activate), topup (add credits). By default renders the UI iframe with a one-line placeholder; pass `mode: 'text'` for a markdown-only summary on CLI / text-only hosts, or `mode: 'auto'` to include both.

result.name: topup
result.title: Top up credits
result.description: Add SolvaPay credits for the current customer. On UI hosts this opens the embedded top-up flow; on text hosts returns a markdown summary with a top-up URL. This tool only returns a read-only snapshot or opens the UI — credits are not charged until the customer confirms payment in the embedded flow. Also available: manage_account (current plan + balance + usage), upgrade (switch to a recurring plan). By default renders the UI iframe with a one-line placeholder; pass `mode: 'text'` for a markdown-only summary on CLI / text-only hosts, or `mode: 'auto'` to include both.

result.name: create_checkout_session
result.description: UI-only; agents should prefer `upgrade` / `manage_account` / `activate_plan`. Create a SolvaPay hosted checkout session and return its URL. The UI opens this URL in a new tab when Stripe Elements is blocked by the host sandbox.

result.name: create_payment_intent
result.description: UI-only; agents should prefer `upgrade` / `manage_account` / `activate_plan`. Create a Stripe payment intent for the authenticated customer to purchase a plan. Returns { clientSecret, publishableKey, accountId?, customerRef } for confirmation with Stripe Elements in the app UI.

result.name: process_payment
result.description: UI-only; agents should prefer `upgrade` / `manage_account` / `activate_plan`. Process a Stripe payment intent after client-side confirmation and create the SolvaPay purchase. Call after confirmPayment resolves to short-circuit webhook latency.

result.name: create_customer_session
result.description: UI-only; agents should prefer `upgrade` / `manage_account` / `activate_plan`. Create a SolvaPay hosted customer portal session and return its URL. Used to let a paid customer manage or cancel their purchase in a new tab.

result.name: create_topup_payment_intent
result.description: UI-only; agents should prefer `upgrade` / `manage_account` / `activate_plan`. Create a Stripe payment intent for a credit top-up. Credits are recorded by the SolvaPay webhook after confirmation.

result.name: attach_business_details
result.description: UI-only; agents should prefer `upgrade` / `manage_account` / `activate_plan`. Attach business purchase details to a payment intent and retrieve the computed tax breakdown.

result.name: cancel_renewal
result.description: UI-only; agents should prefer `upgrade` / `manage_account` / `activate_plan`. Cancel the auto-renewal on an active purchase. Backend keeps access until the current period ends.

result.name: reactivate_renewal
result.description: UI-only; agents should prefer `upgrade` / `manage_account` / `activate_plan`. Undo a pending cancellation so auto-renewal resumes. Only valid while the purchase is still active and its end date hasn't passed.

result.name: activate_plan
result.title: Activate plan
result.description: Activate a plan for the current customer. With a `planRef`: free plans activate immediately; usage-based plans activate when the balance covers the configured usage; paid plans return a markdown checkout link on text hosts or open the embedded checkout on UI hosts. Without a `planRef`: returns the available plans so the customer can pick — UI hosts render the embedded checkout picker, text hosts see a plans list. Also available: upgrade (direct to checkout), manage_account (current plan + usage), topup (add credits). By default renders the UI iframe with a one-line placeholder; pass `mode: 'text'` for a markdown-only summary on CLI / text-only hosts, or `mode: 'auto'` to include both.
